movie-01.title: Shinchan Movie | Very Very Tasty Tasty | (2013) | Hindi
movie-01.info: Join Shinchan and the Kasukabe Defense Force in this hilarious culinary adventure! When a legendary sauce is threatened by a strict B-class gourmet organization, the team must step up to protect the flavors of the streets in a wild showdown full of delicious comedy.

show-01.title: Kiteresu Season - 1
show-01.info: Step into the incredible world of Kiteretsu, a young genius inventor who uncovers a treasure trove of revolutionary blueprints left behind by his ancestor, Great Kiteretsu. Alongside his loyal wooden robot companion Korosuke, he builds gadgets that turn everyday neighborhood life into a series of brilliant adventures.
